message:
bd-1q5.14: E2E test for flicker-free sync bracket round-trip

14 tests covering: sync bracket pairing and flicker-free analysis,
multi-frame round-trips, cursor-hide fallback when sync unsupported,
resize between frames (3 sizes), render.sync_bracket tracing span
with bracket_supported/fallback_used fields, no ERROR logs during
normal operation, WARN logged when fallback engaged, deterministic
output verification, and JSONL analysis record validation.

Enables ftui-render tracing feature in ftui-harness for span capture.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
